name: funnelOptimize
invariants: output.ok === false || !output.result.stages || output.result.stages.every(function(s){ return Number.isFinite(s.visitors) && Number.isFinite(s.dropoff) && s.dropoff >= 0 && s.dropoff <= 100 && Number.isFinite(s.convFromTop); })
_note: LENS_ACTIONS calculator. reads artifact.data.stages (array of {name,count} pasted as JSON). <2 stages → {message} guidance. per-stage: visitors=count; dropoff=% lost from prior stage clamped [0,100]; convFromTop=count/topCount×100. biggestLeakage/leakageRate = worst-dropoff stage. POISON: count via finInt floored at 0, prior floored at 1 → no negative/Infinity dropoff leak (prior `parseInt(0)||1` with a 0 prior emitted dropoff:-29900). Card renders stages[].stage+convFromTop+visitors+dropoff/overallConversion/biggestLeakage/quickWin EXACTLY. Pinned by server/tests/marketing-lens-macros.test.js.
